name: Zahid Hasan Tonmoy
title: MERN Full Stack Developer | Data Analyst | AI Agent Developer | Digital Marketer
aboutMe:
Hello! I'm Zahid Hasan Tonmoy, a MERN Full Stack Developer, Data Analyst, AI Agent Developer, and Digital Marketer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh.
I build end-to-end web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js — and I specialise in transforming complex data into actionable insights, building intelligent AI solutions, and crafting effective digital strategies to drive growth.
My journey in technology and marketing has equipped me with a unique blend of full-stack engineering, analytical prowess, creative problem-solving, and a deep understanding of digital landscapes.

projects.title: Flexpath
projects.description:
lexPath is a mobile-first gig economy platform designed specifically for Bangladesh. It helps connect job seekers (like students, freelancers) with employers (such as small businesses or households) who need temporary, flexible workers for short-term tasks.

Developed using Flutter (frontend) and Supabase (backend), FlexPath provides a localized, secure, and user-friendly job matching experience. The app ensures trust and authenticity through NID (National ID) verification, real-time messaging, and role-based dashboards for different user types.
⚙️ Core Functionalities:
👤 User Roles & Access

    Job Seeker Panel: Register, upload NID, browse/apply to jobs, chat with employers.

    Employer Panel: Post jobs, review applicants, hire workers, message seekers.

    Admin Panel: Approve NID submissions, manage users, resolve disputes.

🔐 Authentication & Verification

    Secure email/password & social logins

    NID verification with admin approval

    Role-based access control

📲 Job System

    Dynamic job feed with search & filters

    Job posting with details like title, description, budget

    Job application & status tracking

    Ratings & reviews after job completion

💬 Real-Time Chat

    In-app messaging system using Supabase Realtime

    Instant communication between seekers and employers

🛡️ Admin Features

    Dashboard with user/job stats

    NID approval panel

    User and job management

    Manual dispute resolution tools

💼 Technology Stack

    Frontend: Flutter 3.x

    Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Realtime)

    Dev Tools: VS Code, Android Studio, GitHub, Figma

projects.title: Gold Price Predictor
projects.description:
This project focuses on predicting the daily closing price of gold using various machine learning regression algorithms. Based on historical financial data like Open, High, Low, and Volume, the study aims to determine the most accurate model for gold price forecasting.

The project also includes a web application that allows users to input data and receive real-time price predictions using the trained models. The goal is to provide a practical tool for investors, students, and researchers to make informed predictions using machine learning.
⚙️ Core Functionalities:
📥 Data Preprocessing

    Load and clean historical gold price dataset

    Convert date formats, handle missing values (none found)

    Apply feature scaling (StandardScaler)

📊 Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

    Correlation heatmaps and pairplots

    Time series visualizations of price trends

    Feature relationship analysis (Price vs. Open, High, Low, Volume)

🔧 Model Training & Evaluation

    15+ regression models tested:

        Linear Regression, Ridge, Lasso, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, Huber Regressor, etc.

    Metrics used: R², MSE, RMSE, MAE

    Best model: Huber Regressor with R² ≈ 0.9999

🤖 Prediction System

    Predict prices using new input values (Open, High, Low, Volume)

    Save results to CSV

🌐 Web Application

    Built to let users interactively input data

    Select preferred algorithm from dropdown

    View predicted gold price instantly

📈 Performance Insights

    Extremely high accuracy using price-related features

    Demonstrated suitability for "nowcasting" daily prices

projects.title: Halarnati
projects.description:
Halarnati is a lightweight web-based file and text sharing platform designed with a playful, user-friendly interface. Created by Zahid Hasan, it allows users to upload files, write descriptions, and share content securely or publicly. The interface is styled with modern UI elements and includes casual Bangla-English mixed language to make it more relatable, especially for Bangladeshi users.

Functionalities:

    Upload files with a title and text description

    Optionally add a password to lock entries

    Search for uploaded entries

    View and download uploaded files

    Copy shared links and content to clipboard

    Paginate through multiple entries

    Password-protected content unlocking feature

projects.title: OffenseOrbit
projects.description: OffenseOrbit is an advanced crime management platform designed to make communication between citizens and law enforcement seamless. By harnessing technology, OffenseOrbit helps streamline processes and ensure public safety.

projects.title: Smart Drainage System
projects.description:
Smart Drainage Monitor Project Description

The Smart Drainage Monitor is an innovative IoT-based system designed to prevent urban flooding by monitoring drainage chambers, detecting blockages, and automating clearance. This project addresses the critical issue of clogged drains, which often lead to waterlogging in cities, causing damage and disruption. By combining advanced hardware, cloud technology, and a user-friendly Android app, the system ensures real-time monitoring and efficient management of drainage systems.

Project Overview

The Smart Drainage Monitor uses an ESP32-S3 microcontroller to collect data from multiple sensors, including water level, sonar (HC-SR04), gas (MQ8), temperature (LM35), IR, flame, and GPS modules. These sensors act as the system's "eyes," detecting water levels, potential blockages, and environmental conditions. The data is sent to Firebase Realtime Database, a cloud-based "notebook" that stores and updates sensor readings instantly. The Android app, developed as the primary user interface, displays this data, alerts users to blockages, and allows manual or automatic control of a servo motor to clear drains.

Key Features

Real-Time Monitoring: The app shows water levels for three drainage chambers, updated every 2 seconds.

Blockage Detection: If two chambers are full and one is empty, the empty chamber is flagged as blocked.

Sensor Insights: Displays data from sonar, gas, temperature, and GPS.

User Controls: Includes a map button, refresh button, and servo switches for manual or auto mode.

Technical Components

Hardware: ESP32-S3 with sensors running MicroPython to collect and send data to Firebase.

Software: Android app (Java, minSdk 26) with Firebase integration.

Cloud: Firebase Realtime Database stores sensor data and servo control settings.

projects.title: Curious Cart BD
projects.description:
Curious Cart BD is a full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. This isn't just another online store — it's a thoughtful solution that combines technology with emotional wellness.

Key Features:
- Responsive UI/UX with Tailwind CSS
- Full cart & wishlist functionality with React Context API
- Product management system with dynamic variants
- Social sharing capabilities
- Interactive image slideshow
- RESTful API endpoints for product data
- Secure authentication system

Tech Stack: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, REST API

projects.title: Jerseyvault
projects.description:
Jerseyvault is a full-featured e-commerce platform built with React.js and powered by Supabase. It showcases full-stack development skills and attention to detail in creating a seamless user experience.

Key Features:
- Frontend: React.js with React Router for SPA navigation
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Authentication, Real-time APIs)
- State Management: React Context API for cart functionality
- Responsive UI: Custom CSS with mobile-first design
- Complete shopping flow: Browse → Add to Cart → Checkout
- User authentication and profile management
- Order tracking and history
- Wishlist functionality
- Product reviews and ratings system
- Inventory management with stock validation

projects.title: Vortex Shield
projects.description:
Vortex Shield is a cybersecurity-themed file encryption suite featuring a distinct cyberpunk aesthetic. It provides tools for securely encrypting, decrypting, and permanently deleting files. The project consists of two main components: a native desktop application for Windows and a modern web application.

Desktop Application (Python):
- GUI Framework: CustomTkinter with Drag-and-Drop support
- Cryptography: AES-GCM algorithm, Argon2id key derivation
- Features: File encryption (.vortex extension), decryption, and secure deletion (3-pass overwrite)
- Duress mode, sound effects, single-file executable via PyInstaller

Web Application (React/Vite):
- Tech Stack: React, TypeScript, Vite
- UI Components: CyberButton, MatrixText, LogViewer, DropZone
- Client-side encryption simulation in a browser

projects.title: LocalDrop Pro
projects.description:
LocalDrop Pro is a modern, secure, peer-to-peer (P2P) file sharing and real-time chat web application. It allows devices to connect directly via WebRTC to transfer files and messages without intermediate servers.

Key Features:
- Direct P2P Transfer via WebRTC (PeerJS)
- Easy Pairing via 6-digit short ID or QR code
- Universal file support: any type and size
- Directory support: auto-zips folders before sending
- Drag & Drop interface
- Queue system with pause, resume, and cancel
- Real-time progress bars and transfer history
- Integrated text chat between peers
- Multiple visual themes: Aurora, Cyberpunk, Minimal
- PWA support for native-like installation
- End-to-End Encryption via AES-GCM
